untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time earnings data (actual earnings vs. analyst expectations) which is NOT available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The strategy depends on an external fundamental data feed (earnings_surprise metric) that must be sourced from a separate data provider and is not computable from price/volume/technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: This is a fundamental event-driven signal that cannot be translated into a purely technical rule using only the allowed price, volume, and technical indicators. Implementation requires: (1) An earnings calendar data feed, (2) Actual vs. consensus earnings surprise calculation, (3) Event-triggered entry/exit logic rather than indicator-based conditions. Recommend implementing as a separate event handler in the backtest engine with access to fundamental data sources (e.g., Bloomberg, FactSet, Yahoo Finance earnings API).
